name: Deccan Meat Burtas
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the onion well.
2. Next, pound the meat or fish (underdone beef is best).
3. Add as much cayenne pepper as will stand on a silver threepenny piece, the same amount of mace, salt, and a few drops of lemon juice.
4. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
5. Add all the ingredients to the melted butter.
6. Cook very slowly for about 1/4 hour.
7. Serve on buttered toast or fried bread.
